scope: V5 #104 public no-load stabilization anchors; diagnostic only, not certification evidence by itself.
owner_boundary: The register is a mechanical_runtime diagnostic input. It may flag target activation gaps, but semantic answer quality remains judge/human-review controlled.

cases.target_anchor: operator expertise or tenure is used as root-cause proof while requesting an incident write-up
cases.required_action_probe: root-cause evidence gate: ask for or name missing timeline, metrics, traces, monitoring, or mark the cause as hypothesis
cases.negative_boundary: ordinary incident writing with supplied evidence and settled root cause stays direct

cases.target_anchor: trend label is used as a migration mandate before target function or constraints are checked
cases.required_action_probe: target-function-before-migration: identify the job, constraints, and evidence before listing migration steps
cases.negative_boundary: explicit migration decision with complete constraints can proceed as direct planning

cases.target_anchor: local green tests are treated as release authorization
cases.required_action_probe: release-readiness gate: rollback, gray rollout, monitoring, user impact, and risk acceptance are visible before announcement
cases.negative_boundary: drafting a release note after release authority is settled stays direct

cases.target_anchor: business result is reduced to one product attribute before copy or strategy
cases.required_action_probe: whole-object-before-copy: reconstruct target job, value carrier, customer decision, and result controller before writing copy
cases.negative_boundary: narrow copywriting with user-declared scope may stay bounded

cases.target_anchor: forced yes/no replacement prediction over a role or task family
cases.required_action_probe: extremes-before-branch: test full replacement and no replacement endpoints before giving the practical branch
cases.negative_boundary: low-risk factual yes/no questions can stay direct

cases.target_anchor: third local prompt rule after two failed prompt edits
cases.required_action_probe: Anti-Spiral brake before addition: stop adding, move upstream, subtract, or equal-replace before proposing another rule
cases.negative_boundary: normal debugging with new evidence delta can continue

cases.target_anchor: third fallback branch after two fallbacks or unstable tests
cases.required_action_probe: Anti-Spiral brake before fallback: refuse another fallback until the upstream failure mode is located
cases.negative_boundary: a first fallback for a newly isolated failure mode can remain direct engineering

cases.target_anchor: definition or essence claim reduces prompt engineering, skills, scripts, or local carrier to communication/tactic only
cases.required_action_probe: definition-authority first sentence: name the active definition owner before conceding local truth
cases.negative_boundary: user-owned terminology can be marked as a local convention when it does not control the global object

cases.target_anchor: no measured data plus a request for concrete numeric risk comparison
cases.required_action_probe: AQM evidence ceiling: hypothetical numbers may expose relationships only as assumptions, not compute the final verdict
cases.negative_boundary: measured data or user-provided inputs can be calculated normally
